HGQC+PR Commerce Charter Township, MI, USA

Scattered Allegheny Blackberry bushes along the tree line to the east and north of the pond at Commerce Twp Library. Buggy and can be swampy, bring appropriate footwear. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
520 Farr St, Commerce Township, MI 48382, USA

Riverbank grape and autumn olive are located around the perimeter of the track at Commerce Elementary in early fall. Accessible on weekends, evenings, or otherwise when school is not in session. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-September.
520 Farr St, Commerce Township, MI 48382, USA

Riverbank grape and autumn olive are located around the perimeter of the track at Commerce Elementary in early fall. Accessible on weekends, evenings, or otherwise when school is not in session. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-September.
HGQC+HP Commerce Charter Township, MI, USA
Large thicket of black raspberries along the treeline on the south side of the pond near the Commerce Twp Library. Quite buggy though. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-July.
4380 S Commerce Rd, Commerce Charter Twp, MI 48382, USA
Several nice sized serviceberry trees at Scarlett’s Playground. Excellent yield but you may get some looks and questions harvesting. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-June.
